# xor

Use this skill for the XOR utility subcommand.

## Verified notes

- `cargo run --bin gnostr -- xor --help` shows the live flags.
- `gnostr -V` should be checked when behavior differs across environments.

## Common commands

```bash
cargo run --bin gnostr -- xor --help
gnostr xor --help
```

## Rules

- Keep inputs explicit.
